cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play. Turn this on before reporting a bug.
cfg.event_messages.name: Event Messages
cfg.event_messages.desc: On: reminders include the week's featured event alongside the day name. Off: only the day name is shown, so reminders stay lore-light.
cfg.days_only.name: Days Only
cfg.days_only.desc: Override: always show only the day name, even if Event Messages is turned on above.
cfg.speech_bubbles.name: Speech Bubbles
cfg.speech_bubbles.desc: On: your character says the reminder in a thought-style speech bubble. Off: the reminder floats above your head as a small red label.
cfg.wake_up_delay.name: Wake-Up Delay
cfg.wake_up_delay.desc: How long to wait (in seconds) before showing a reminder after waking up in bed. Lets the wake-up screen finish fading so the message isn't covered up. Set to 0 for instant reminders.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
DebugWarning: Please note you have debug mode turned on. It isn't recommended to leave this on unless you have a purpose for it.
